mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, owner_uid, rule_id, rule_name, rule_desc, rule_type, rule_def, rule_content, rule_md5, inner_share, deprecated, ds_range, rule_target
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM dm_sec_rules WHERE rule_id = #{ruleStrId} and inner_share = 1 limit 1
mapper.update: update dm_sec_rules set rule_id = #{ruleDO.ruleId}, rule_name = #{ruleDO.name}, rule_desc = #{ruleDO.description}, rule_type = #{ruleDO.scriptType, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.secrule.RuleScriptType}, rule_def = #{ruleDO.scriptDef}, rule_content= #{ruleDO.scriptContent}, rule_md5 = #{ruleDO.scriptMD5}, ds_range = #{ruleDO.ruleDsRange, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, rule_target = #{ruleDO.ruleTarget, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.secrule.RuleTarget}, inner_share = #{ruleDO.innerShare}, deprecated = #{ruleDO.deprecated}, gmt_modified= now() WHERE id = #{ruleId} and inner_share = 1 limit 1
mapper.delete: update dm_sec_rules set deprecated = 1, gmt_modified= now() WHERE rule_id = #{ruleStrId} and inner_share = 1 limit 1
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM dm_sec_rules WHERE (owner_uid = #{ownerUid} or inner_share = 1) AND (rule_name like concat('%',#{searchKeywords},'%') or rule_desc like concat('%',#{searchKeywords},'%')) order by gmt_create desc

SELECT
FROM dm_sec_rules WHERE (owner_uid = #{ownerUid} or inner_share = 1) order by gmt_create desc

SELECT
FROM dm_sec_rules WHERE id in #{item} and ((owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and inner_share = 0) or inner_share = 1) order by gmt_create desc

SELECT
FROM dm_sec_rules WHERE id = #{ruleId} and ((owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and inner_share = 0) or inner_share = 1) limit 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM dm_sec_rules WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} AND id = #{ruleId} and inner_share = 0 limit 1
mapper.update: update dm_sec_rules set rule_name = #{ruleDO.name}, rule_desc = #{ruleDO.description}, rule_type = #{ruleDO.scriptType, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.secrule.RuleScriptType}, rule_def = #{ruleDO.scriptDef}, rule_content= #{ruleDO.scriptContent}, rule_md5 = #{ruleDO.scriptMD5}, ds_range = #{ruleDO.ruleDsRange, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, rule_target = #{ruleDO.ruleTarget, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.secrule.RuleTarget}, gmt_modified= now() WHERE owner_uid = #{ownerUid} AND id = #{ruleId} and inner_share = 0 limit 1
